rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.352, which governs school district procurement compliance for facilities standards. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A school district shall comply with all applicable state laws and rules relating to procurement for district purchases relating to achieving compliance with the facilities standards adopted under Section 7.061 or provided by other law or agency rule.
_note: Rule text concerns school district purchasing requirements; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection between the two provisions.
